---
title: "Montage Report"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: flatly
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    pdf-engine: xelatex
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  fig-align: center
---

```{r}
rd <- readRDS("__REPORT_DATA_FILE__")
manifest <- rd$manifest
panels <- rd$panels
layout <- rd$params$layout
is_html <- knitr::is_html_output()
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x
qc <- rd$qc %||% data.frame()
fmt <- neuromosaic::montage_report_formatters(
  manifest = manifest,
  layout = layout,
  is_html = is_html
)
```

# `r rd$params$title`

```{r}
#| results: asis
fmt$emit_report_styles()
fmt$emit_report_overview()
fmt$emit_qc_summary(qc)
```

# Maps

```{r}
#| results: asis
if (nrow(manifest) == 0L) {
  cat("*No maps to display.*\n")
} else {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(manifest))) {
    row <- manifest[i, , drop = FALSE]
    map_id <- as.character(row$map_id[[1]])
    label <- as.character(row$label[[1]])
    panel <- panels[[map_id]] %||% list()

    fmt$emit_panel_heading(i, label)
    if ("description" %in% names(row) &&
        !is.na(row$description[[1]]) &&
        nzchar(row$description[[1]])) {
      cat(row$description[[1]], "\n\n", sep = "")
    }
    fmt$emit_metadata(row)
    fmt$emit_panel_qc(panel$qc)

    volume_image <- panel$volume_image %||% panel$volume_image_path
    surface_image <- panel$surface_image %||% panel$surface_image_path
    fmt$emit_panel_image(volume_image, paste(label, "volume montage"))
    fmt$emit_panel_image(surface_image, paste(label, "surface montage"))

    fmt$emit_table(panel$table)
  }
}
```

# Provenance

```{r}
#| results: asis
prov <- rd$provenance
if (is.null(prov)) {
  cat("*No provenance metadata available.*\n")
} else {
  prov_fields <- vapply(names(prov), function(field) {
    value <- prov[[field]]
    if (is.null(value) || length(value) != 1L) "" else as.character(value)
  }, character(1))
  prov_fields <- prov_fields[nzchar(prov_fields)]
  if (length(prov_fields) == 0L) {
    cat("*No scalar provenance metadata available.*\n")
  } else {
    prov_tbl <- data.frame(
      Field = names(prov_fields),
      Value = unname(prov_fields),
      check.names = FALSE
    )
    cat(knitr::kable(prov_tbl, format = "pipe"), sep = "\n")
  }
}
```

# Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
